descriptions.text: COSMO COMMAND is a love letter to classic Game Boy shmups and a certain franchise featuring animals flying space ships. Try for the highest score while listening to banter from your teammates and take part in a story of galactic proportions!

In a distant galaxy, the peace of the cosmos is at stake! The Reptile Empire has invaded the star systems of the Mammalian Federation, and it’s up to the plucky heroes of Cosmo Command to save the day.
